apps.name: Mantella
apps.tagline: A fast, minimal PDF reader for your Mac.
apps.summary: Point Mantella at a folder of PDFs and it becomes your library — crisp native-quality rendering, instant search, and it always remembers exactly where you left off.
intro: Mantella is a lightweight desktop PDF reader built for people who live in PDFs — papers, books, manuals, sheet music — and want them to open instantly and look sharp at any zoom level.

Choose a library folder and Mantella scans it for PDFs and keeps it in sync as files come and go. Pages are rendered by pdfium, the same engine Chromium uses, so everything looks exactly as it should. No accounts, no cloud, no clutter.

features.title: Your folder is your library
features.description: Pick a folder and Mantella recursively finds every PDF inside it, presenting them in a browsable folder tree that stays in sync as you add, move, or remove files on disk.

features.title: Picks up where you left off
features.description: Mantella remembers the page, scroll position, and zoom level for every file individually. Close a book mid-chapter and it opens right back to the same spot — even weeks later.

features.title: Find things fast
features.description: Search your whole library by filename, navigate the folder tree, and pin your favorites so the documents you reach for most are always one click away.

features.title: Native-quality rendering
features.description: Pages are rendered by pdfium — Chromium's PDF engine — on a dedicated worker thread, so text and figures stay crisp at any zoom level and scrolling stays smooth even in large documents.

features.title: Keyboard friendly
features.description: Navigate pages, zoom, and search without touching the mouse. Common actions all have shortcuts, so reading stays fluid.

features.title: Light and private
features.description: Built with Tauri and Rust, Mantella is small and fast. Your reading state is stored locally on your Mac — there's no account, no sync service, and no tracking.

privacyPolicy.summary: Mantella does not collect, transmit, or share any personal data. It has no accounts, no servers, and no analytics.

sections.title: What we collect
body: Nothing. Mantella has no accounts, no sign-up, and no servers. Your settings and per-file reading state (page, scroll position, zoom) are stored locally on your Mac, and we never see them.
There is no analytics, no advertising SDK, no crash-reporting service, and no third-party tracking of any kind in the app.

sections.title: Files and folder access
body: Mantella reads the library folder you choose so it can list and render your PDF files, and it watches that folder for changes to keep your library in sync. Your documents are opened locally for display only — their contents are never uploaded, indexed elsewhere, or sent off your device.

sections.title: What we share
body: Because no data ever leaves your device to us, there is nothing for us to share or sell.

sections.title: Your data, your control
body: You can change or remove the library folder at any time, or delete the app entirely, which removes its locally stored settings and reading state from your device. Your PDF files themselves are never modified.

sections.title: Children's privacy
body: Mantella does not knowingly collect any information from anyone, including children under 13.

sections.title: Changes to this policy
body: If this policy ever changes, the updated version will be posted on this page with a new effective date.

sections.title: Contact
body: Questions about privacy in Mantella? Email sendtoshevvy@gmail.com.

apps.name: Perch
apps.tagline: One shortcut. Your window, centered and alone.
apps.summary: A tiny macOS menu-bar utility that resizes, centers, and focuses your frontmost window with a single global shortcut — everything else politely steps out of the way.
intro: Perch is a tiny macOS menu-bar app with one job: press a global shortcut and the window you're working in snaps to a clean, centered size while everything else tucks out of view.
It runs quietly in the menu bar with no Dock icon, no accounts, and nothing to configure beyond the shortcut and size you like.

features.title: One global shortcut
features.description: Press ⌃⌥↵ (Control + Option + Return) from anywhere and the frontmost window resizes to 80% width and 90% height of the screen and centers itself. The shortcut is fully customizable in Settings.

features.title: Everything else hides behind
features.description: Other windows on the same screen are moved behind the focused window instead of being closed or minimized — they're still there, just out of the way until you need them.

features.title: Adjustable sizing
features.description: Sliders in Settings let you tune exactly how wide and tall the focused window should be, so Perch fits how you like to work.

features.title: Lives in the menu bar
features.description: No Dock icon, no clutter — just a small menu-bar item with a Focus Now action, a Launch at Login toggle, and quick access to the Accessibility permission it needs.

privacyPolicy.summary: Perch does not collect, transmit, or share any personal data. It has no accounts, no servers, and no analytics.

sections.title: What we collect
body: Nothing. Perch has no accounts, no sign-up, and no servers. Your shortcut and window-size preferences are stored locally on your Mac using standard macOS UserDefaults, and we never see them.
There is no analytics, no advertising SDK, no crash-reporting service, and no third-party tracking of any kind in the app.

sections.title: Accessibility permission
body: Perch asks for Accessibility access because it needs it to read and move the position and size of windows belonging to other apps — that's how the focus shortcut works. This permission is used only to arrange windows on your screen and is never used to read window contents or send anything off your device.

sections.title: What we share
body: Because no data ever leaves your device to us, there is nothing for us to share or sell.

sections.title: Your data, your control
body: You can revoke Accessibility access at any time in System Settings → Privacy & Security → Accessibility, or remove the app entirely, which removes its local preferences from your device.

sections.title: Children's privacy
body: Perch does not knowingly collect any information from anyone, including children under 13.

sections.title: Changes to this policy
body: If this policy ever changes, the updated version will be posted on this page with a new effective date.

sections.title: Contact
body: Questions about privacy in Perch? Email sendtoshevvy@gmail.com.

apps.name: Todo Tide
apps.summary: Make color-coded lists, check things off, and keep a list on your Home Screen. No account, no ads — your tasks stay on your device.
intro: Todo Tide is a minimalist to-do app for people who want to capture a task and move on — no clutter, no accounts, no noise.
Built around a clean, monospaced design that quietly follows your system light or dark appearance, it stays out of the way so you can focus on what's actually on your list.

features.title: Multiple lists
features.description: Keep separate, color-coded lists for work, groceries, reading, travel, or anything else. Swipe between them, and tap to check things off. Completed tasks tuck away neatly and can be shown or cleared whenever you like.

features.title: Home Screen widget
features.description: Pin any list to your Home Screen so the things that matter are visible at a glance. Tap the widget to jump straight into that list.

features.title: Private by design
features.description: Everything lives on your device. There's no sign-up, no cloud account to manage, no analytics, and no tracking. Your tasks are yours.

features.title: Designed to be simple
features.description: Add a task in a tap and check it off when it's done. Reorder tasks and lists, color-code each one, and let the app follow your system light or dark appearance automatically.

screenshots.alt: Todo Tide lists overview with color-coded cards
A to-do list with tasks ready to check off

privacyPolicy.summary: Todo Tide does not collect, transmit, or share any personal data. Everything you create stays on your device.

sections.title: What we collect
body: Nothing. Todo Tide has no accounts, no sign-up, and no servers of its own. Your lists, tasks, and settings are stored locally on your device and, if you enable it, in your private iCloud account via Apple's standard system storage. We never see this data.
There is no analytics, no advertising SDK, no crash-reporting service, and no third-party tracking of any kind in the app.

sections.title: What we share
body: Because no data ever leaves your device to us, there is nothing for us to share or sell. We do not have access to your tasks and could not hand them to anyone even if asked.

sections.title: Your data, your control
body: You can delete any task, list, or the entire app at any time, which removes the associated data from your device. If you use iCloud, you can manage or remove that copy from your device's iCloud settings.

sections.title: Children's privacy
body: Todo Tide does not knowingly collect any information from anyone, including children under 13.

sections.title: Changes to this policy
body: If this policy ever changes, the updated version will be posted on this page with a new effective date.

sections.title: Contact
body: Questions about privacy in Todo Tide? Email sendtoshevvy@gmail.com.
